heading: Federal acquisition
label: 3922 Federal acquisition
text: The Secretary is authorized to purchase wetlands or interests in wetlands, which are not acquired under the authority of the Migratory Bird Conservation Act of 1929 (), consistent with the wetlands priority conservation plan established under .16 U.S.C. 715–715ssection 3921 of this title
notes: References in TextThe Migratory Bird Conservation Act of 1929, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to subchapter III (§ 715 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Feb. 18, 1929, ch. 25745 Stat. 1222section 715 of this title
